title: Trump Signals U.S. Is Prepared for a Long War Against Iran
summary_full: President Trump also declined to rule out sending ground troops into Iran as the conflict spread into the Gulf countries and Lebanon and Israel exchanged strikes.
summary_public: President Trump also declined to rule out sending ground troops into Iran as the conflict spread into the Gulf countries and Lebanon and Israel exchanged strikes.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Prepared for a Long War Against Iran
